plugins.name: recoup-skills
plugins.description: The open skills library — portable music-industry skills (artist management, songwriting, analytics, release campaigns, setup) you can drop into any agent. Also installable directly via `npx skills add recoupable/skills`.

interface.shortDescription: Music industry skills for AI agents
interface.longDescription: Teach your coding agent how to manage artists, write songs, analyze music analytics, plan releases, and more. General skills work for anyone — platform skills integrate with the Recoupable platform.

plugins.name: recoup-records
plugins.description: A record label in a box — one install that bundles every Recoup plugin: setup, research, deals, content, song analysis, and releases. Install this instead of picking individual plugins.

interface.shortDescription: A record label in a box
interface.longDescription: The whole Recoup platform as a single plugin: artist setup and API access, music-industry research, catalog deal review, content creation, song audio analysis, and end-to-end release workflows — every skill, agent, and hook in one bundle.

plugins.name: recoup-internal
plugins.description: Recoup's internal toolkit for AI agents — engineering and operations. Write and maintain high-signal GitHub tracking issues, deliver them docs-first and test-driven end-to-end, benchmark any plugin or skills folder against the frontier of skill design, work the catalog-valuation sales funnel in Attio, produce account-health snapshots for any Recoup account, and draft, publish, and measure data-grounded social posts.

interface.shortDescription: Recoup's internal engineering + ops skills: issues, skill benchmarks, sales pipeline, account health
interface.longDescription: Recoup's internal toolkit for AI agents. Write and maintain high-signal GitHub tracking issues in the Recoupable house style and deliver them docs-first and test-driven with preview verification, benchmark any plugin or skills folder against the frontier of skill design, work the catalog-valuation sales funnel in Attio from lead to Pro signup, produce account-health snapshots for any Recoup account, and draft, publish, and measure data-grounded social posts.
